exort.message.debug_load_usage: Nýtsla: /exort debug benchmark start [players] [seconds] | /exort debug benchmark stop
exort.message.debug_load_verdict: Úrslit av load-test: %1$s (TPS min %2$s, max %3$s, avg %4$s, p1 %5$s; MSPT min %6$s, max %7$s, avg %8$s, p95 %9$s, p99 %10$s)

exort.message.debug_load_summary: Benchmark-modell: spælarar %1$s, chunks %2$s, goymslur/chunk %3$s, bussar/chunk %4$s, monitorar/chunk %5$s, mett ops/tick %6$s (global %7$s, chunk %8$s), db/tick %9$s, monitor updates %10$s/t%11$s, wire %12$s/%13$s miss %14$s%% cover %15$s%%, mált vindeyga %16$ss eftir setup (min warmup %17$ss), jitter %18$s%%, guard-spælarar %19$s, guard-entities %20$s/%21$s, guard-churn %22$s/tick, world lanes %23$s, world ops/tick %24$s, world blocks %25$s, vatn-test wire longd %26$s, vatnkeldur %27$s, eyka vatn-chunks %28$s

exort.message.debug_load_hints: Syntetisk benchmark-ráð: ráðandi %1$s; CPU %2$s%%, WIRE %3$s%%, DISPLAYS %4$s%%, DB %5$s%%, WIRELESS %6$s%%, GUARDS %7$s%%, WORLD %8$s%% (placements %9$s).

exort.message.debug_load_move_away: Far %1$s chunks burtur frá Exort-blokkum ella sløkk benchmark.simulateDisplays.
exort.message.debug_worldedit_mode_inval: Ógildur WorldEdit debug mode: %1$s. Brúka compact/normal/full.
